_note: Search queries come from watchlist.json. Optional per-retailer 'searchTerms' are appended as extra queries.

ebgames._note: PRIMARY TCG source. Per-store availability via /api/store/SearchStores; status is a red/yellow/green color per store. storeTerms feed that endpoint; keepCities filters which returned stores we keep. maxProducts caps per-run product-page visits (broad keywords => more products => slower).

londondrugs._note: Carries TCG. v1 = online listing + price. Per-store 'Check Nearby Availability' (Mozu/Kibo inventory API) is a v2.

superstore._note: DISABLED by default: RCSS online catalog is snacks/plush/apparel only — Pokemon cards are in-store impulse items not listed online, so card keywords match nothing. Set enabled:true if you also want to track Pokemon snacks/merch there.
